'''Gairks''' were aquatic predators that lived on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. The gilled creatures had warty [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and huge sucking [[Mouth/Legends|mouths]] that were large enough to swallow a [[Human/Legends|Human]]. Gairks could combine their mouths to create even larger amounts of suction.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], while on a [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|mission to Ansion]], became entangled with a school of these river-dwelling creatures. The young Jedi, however, were able to disengage from the force of the creatures' powerfully combined suction vortex and free themselves.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
